module.name: pillow
build-commands: pip3 install --verbose --exists-action=i --no-index --find-links="file://${PWD}" --prefix=${FLATPAK_DEST} --no-build-isolation "pillow" -C zlib=enable -C jpeg=enable -C tiff=enable -C freetype=enable -C raqm=enable -C lcms=enable -C webp=enable -C jpeg2000=enable -C avif=enable
